description_long: This adult pedestrian is depicted with a striking punk-inspired appearance, featuring a tall, spiked mohawk hairstyle and a dramatic face mask or makeup. He wears a zip-up jacket adorned with a large skull graphic on the front and stylized text on the back, paired with knee-length cargo shorts that have visible pockets and straps. His hands are relaxed at his sides, and he stands in a casual, confident posture. The outfit is completed with low-top sneakers, and the overall look is accessorized with visible belts and pouches attached to the shorts. The character's build is athletic, and the clothing fits loosely, suggesting comfort and mobility. The visual style is bold and urban, making this figure stand out in any street or city environment.
description: A punk-styled adult male with a spiked mohawk, skull jacket, cargo shorts, and sneakers, standing confidently. The look is bold, urban, and accessorized with belts and pouches.
description_view_0: Front view shows the spiked mohawk, skull graphic on the jacket, face mask or makeup, and relaxed stance.
description_view_1: Left side view highlights the mohawk's profile, the jacket's sleeve details, and the cargo shorts' side pockets and straps.
description_view_2: Rear view reveals the stylized text on the back of the jacket, the mohawk's shape, and the arrangement of pouches and pockets on the shorts.
description_view_3: Right side view mirrors the left, showing the mohawk, sleeve graphics, and the shorts' side features.
attribute_clothing_type: punk-style zip-up jacket with graphic print, cargo shorts with pockets and straps
